headline: Do Wall Street Analysts Like PTC Inc. Stock?
summary: PTC Inc. has underperformed the broader market over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: PTC INC (NASDAQ:PTC) Fits Peter Lynch's Growth-at-a-Reasonable-Price Stock Screen with Strong Fundamentals and a Low PEG Ratio
summary: PTC Inc. (NASDAQ:PTC) passes the Peter Lynch stock screen with strong 25.59% EPS growth, a 0.58 PEG ratio, low debt, and high profitability, making it a classic growth-at-a-reasonable-price play.

headline: 1 Software Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Avoid
summary: From commerce to culture, software is digitizing every aspect of our lives. Companies bringing it to life have been rewarded with high valuation multiples that make fundraising easier, but they have weighed on the returns lately as the industry has pulled back by 13.5% over the past six months. This drop is a stark contrast from the S&P 500’s 11.5% gain.
